subcodes.first_line: God maketh mention of His servant, that he may remember within his soul and become detached from whatsoever hath been created between the heavens and the earth, and stand firm upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عبده لیتذکر فی نفسه و ینقطع عما خلق بین السموات و الارض و یستقیم علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for detachment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
